hero.headline: Custom Fleet Management Mobile & Web App Development
hero.headlineHtml: Custom Fleet Management Mobile & Web App Development
hero.subheadline: At Brilworks, we design and build custom fleet management apps for mobile and web that transform fleet operations. We build smartest solutions for managing fleets, tracking shipments, and optimising last-mile delivery. Our fleet management app development services give you the tools to reduce costs, increase visibility and deliver better service.

items.title: Fleet Management App Development
items.description: We build apps that allow you to monitor and optimise your vehicle fleets in real time. Track drivers, plan routes, capture performance data and reduce idle time so your fleet becomes a strategic asset, not just a cost centre.

items.title: Inventory Management App Development
items.description: From warehouse operations to inventory tracking and procurement workflows, our supply-chain apps give you the visibility you need to make decisions based on data. You'll get accurate status updates, alerts on delays or stock-outs, and control over processes end-to-end.

items.title: On-Demand Logistics App Development
items.description: On-demand logistics apps for dynamic routing, real-time tracking for customers and dispatchers, helping you win in competitive markets.

items.title: Route Optimisation App Development
items.description: For companies managing complex transportation logistics, we build apps that integrate order volumes, traffic data, vehicle capacities and delivery constraints to plan efficient trips, reduce costs and improve reliability.

items.title: Custom Enterprise Logistics App Development
items.description: Your business is unique. If you need a tailored solution. We design custom logistics apps built to your requirements, with future-proof architecture, data analytics modules and support across mobile and web platforms.

items.title: GPS Fleet Tracking
items.description: We're smarter than most fleet managers. Our software developers have extensive experience in fleet-tracking solutions. Through a combination of real-time GPS tracking, route optimization, and manual regrouping, our proprietary software allows you to easily monitor your fleet anywhere, while on the move.

items.title: Traffic Management Software
items.description: Never be caught out by unexpected road conditions. Our traffic management software lets your team stay informed and updated by providing real-time visibility, insight, and control.

items.title: Delivery Management Software
items.description: Our online POS system makes managing consignment paperwork, sending real-time notifications, and creating delivery records easy!

items.title: Transportation Software
items.description: Let our software will deliver information about the fastest, cheapest, and most convenient for you to transport goods. We bring you the greatest value in pricing and cost savings every time you move goods.

items.title: Supply Chain Management Software
items.description: Our supply chain tracking services make it easy to track, manage and maintain the movement of all your inventory, making sure that you're aware of its location at all times.

faq.q: How much does it cost to develop a fleet management app?
faq.a: The cost depends on the app’s complexity, features, and integrations. A simple delivery tracking app may cost less, while a full-scale fleet management platform with analytics, route optimization, and multi-user dashboards will require a larger investment. We provide detailed estimates after understanding your requirements.

faq.q: How long does it take to build a logistics app?
faq.a: Most fleet management apps take between 8 to 20 weeks to design, develop, and test. Timelines vary based on project scope, custom integrations, and feedback cycles. We follow an agile approach to ensure you start seeing results early.

faq.q: Can you integrate the app with my existing ERP or CRM?
faq.a: Yes. We specialize in connecting logistics systems with popular ERPs, CRMs, and third-party platforms like SAP, Salesforce, Zoho, or any custom-built system you’re using. This keeps your data connected and workflows efficient.

faq.q: Do you offer post-launch maintenance and updates?
faq.a: Absolutely. Our partnership doesn’t end with deployment. We provide continuous support, performance monitoring, and feature upgrades to keep your logistics app secure and up-to-date.

faq.q: Will my fleet management app work across devices?
faq.a: Yes. All our solutions are built to work seamlessly on iOS, Android, and web platforms. Whether it’s for drivers on the road or managers in the office, your team can access data anytime, anywhere.

faq.q: How secure is my fleet management data?
faq.a: We follow best practices for data security and compliance, including data encryption, role-based access control, and secure APIs. Your business and customer data stay protected at every stage.

faq.q: Can you help me scale the app later?
faq.a: Yes. We build every solution with scalability in mind. As your operations grow, we can expand your app’s capacity, add modules, and integrate new technologies without disrupting performance.

faq.q: Do you build white-label fleet solutions?
faq.a: Yes, if you’re a startup or SaaS provider looking to launch a white-label product for fleet management clients, we can create a fully customizable solution that aligns with your brand.
